message:
🌱 atlantis: Atlantis outputs all refreshed resources before outputting the final plan (#1066)

* 🌱 Add atlantis: Atlantis outputs all refreshed resources before outputting mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: remove unmerged PR link and set status to proposed for atlantis#1306

PR #1320 was closed without being merged. Removing the pr field from
sourceUrls, setting mission.status to proposed, and updating the
resolution summary to reflect there is no merged upstream fix.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

+  "mission": {
+    "title": "atlantis: Atlantis outputs all refreshed resources before outputting the final plan output in the PR comments (tf 0.14.2)",
+    "description": "Atlantis outputs all refreshed resources before outputting the final plan output in the PR comments (tf 0.14.2). This issue affects 23+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "proposed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify atlantis troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your atlantis deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review atlantis configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis\n```\nWhat the title says.\n\nI am using atlantis v0.15.1 and tf v0.14.2 and getting this:\n\nwhile the plan output should only include:\n\n```\nNo changes. Infrastructure is up-to-date."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Atlantis outputs all refreshed resources before outputting…",
+        "description": "Attempt at fixing #1306 \n\nMight not be the right place for this logic; first time committer, please let me know if there is a better place to do this\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Atlantis outputs all refreshed resources before… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "A community PR (#1320) was opened to fix this issue but was closed without being merged. No merged fix currently exists upstream. This mission is proposed as a guide for users to work around the issue manually until an official fix is merged.",

+    }
